title: guatteria longifolia
intro: Guatteria longifolia, also known as the "long-leaved guatteria" or "long-leaved guruba," is a plant species within the Annonaceae family. It is traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Guatteria longifolia include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to provide relief from pain and inflammation. Guatteria longifolia can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the leaves and bark are typically steeped in hot water to create a herbal remedy.
